title: Integration: expose hidden signal scores in screener + vol regime/conformal/drawdown in market status

observation.gap_identified: Screener computed options_score, earnings_score, insider_score for each stock but discarded them (not included in response). Market status lacked volatility regime, conformal prediction intervals on crash probs, and market-level drawdown stats. Factor style classification (value/growth/blend) from FF5 decomposition was computed in stock_analyzer but not surfaced in screener.

implementation.feature_built: 1) Screener now exposes 6 new fields per stock: options_score, earnings_score, insider_score, ta_score, factor_style, factor_alpha. 2) Market status now includes vol_regime (S&P 500 30d vol regime from volatility_analytics), crash_intervals (conformal prediction bounds for each horizon), and market_drawdown (current/max drawdown, recovery stats, rolling Sharpe from drawdown_analyzer). 3) Frontend TypeScript types updated for ScreenerStock and MarketStatus.

limitations: No new tests written specifically for the new fields (covered by existing router tests)
Vol regime for market status fetches ^GSPC separately; could reuse data already fetched
Drawdown analysis for market status fetches ^GSPC via yfinance; potential latency addition
assessment.self_critique: Could have also integrated conformal intervals into the per-stock analysis crash_prob display, and added a market-level factor exposure summary. The screener additions are data that was already computed — exposing them is pure win. The market status additions each add a new yfinance/service call which increases latency; in future cycles, these should be cached or parallelized.

next_steps: Cache market drawdown and vol regime with TTL to avoid extra yfinance calls on every market-status request
Display the new screener fields (options/earnings/insider scores, factor style) in frontend screener table
Show conformal intervals as error bars on crash probability display in frontend
Add vol regime indicator to the market dashboard header
Integrate conformal intervals into per-stock crash probability display
